creator: freebsd@wb9.se
text:
It seems that a year ago this port did not support python 3.10:

https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=474ca5810f7f1ff77260aa27dc1fb567b09fb5d3

I did not find any official documentation of supported python versions, but there is a commit prior to 2.1.2 that mentions python 3.10 support, so I would assume it's safe to add support for a 3.10 flavour: 

https://github.com/aleaxit/gmpy/commit/71e94d4dfcc92fb65abe10918c292268a9cf68f0

Current version builds successfully with 3.10 (I haven't extensively tested it; just built as an dependency for netbox).
